prompt: A wide cinematic anime key visual of a bustling modern Tokyo-like district transformed into a multicultural fantasy metropolis under a bright blue midday sky with fluffy clouds. The scene is viewed from street level along a broad pedestrian avenue leading toward a large red torii gate at the center distance, with stone steps, crowds of people, dense commercial buildings, and a Japanese castle rising on a green hill behind the city blocks. A very tall broadcasting tower resembling Tokyo Skytree stands slightly right of center in the background. Fill the sky with exactly 8 airborne fantasy and sci-fi elements: 2 large dragons in flight, 2 winged humanoid angels, 1 huge flying saucer, and 3 smaller UFOs scattered farther away. The city should feel like a coexistence society where humans and fantasy races live together naturally. Add many colorful digital billboards and vertical signs on buildings, including Japanese text and fantasy character advertisements; the largest curved screen on the left should display the text “Shinpi Sekai 神秘世界 ようこそ,” and a lower billboard should reference a multicultural society of different races. In the foreground, place exactly 6 prominent characters across the street scene: on the far left, a tall elf schoolgirl with long brown hair, pointed ears, a white blouse, ribbon tie, and plaid skirt; left-center, a humanoid crocodile or lizard man in casual urban clothes with a jacket and pendant; near him, a small child with animal-like ears wearing a red backpack and scarf; center-left, a white-haired young man with white feathered wings in a light jacket; center-right, a silver-haired cat-eared schoolgirl in a light jacket and dark pleated skirt; right-center, a black-haired teenage boy in a black hoodie with a backpack; and on the far right, a blonde elf schoolgirl with pointed ears, white short-sleeve shirt, tie, and brown plaid skirt. In the midground and background, add a crowd of pedestrians including a few more fantasy species. Also include exactly 3 additional perched or elevated fantasy figures on the right side architecture: 1 dark-clad black-winged girl standing on a ledge, 1 small blonde fairy-like winged girl floating near a rooftop, and 1 tiny golden winged creature near the street. Style: polished high-detail anime illustration, light novel promotional art, sharp linework, vibrant colors, clean atmospheric perspective, crisp sunlight, soft shadows, highly detailed urban signage, a sense of wonder, coexistence, and worldbuilding.
